title: agrostis sandwicensis
intro: Agrostis sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis sandwicensis include the ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and possibly lower blood sugar levels. Agrostis sandwicensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
